title: Package
description: The platform-final artifact the reviewer sees, produced after gating (spec §7.4; model §4 invariant). Grounded in the deterministic package gate's required structural fields. Markdown package files carry these as an audit header plus named sections; this schema is the field contract.

audit_header.description: Identity + state block at the top of the package.

brand.description: Brand id (de-localized from the production 'account' field, spec §0.3 rule 6).

schedule_time.description: Scheduled publish time from the calendar slot (DD-22).

media.description: CONTENT_HOME-relative references to media assets bound to this package.

visual_state.description: Visual decision/state for visual or video formats (e.g. reuse, modify, generate, none).

publish_state.description: Publish readiness state mirrored on the package.

gate_verdict.description: For LIVE packages, the explicit gate verdict; MUST begin PASS for a LIVE package to proceed (deterministic gate requirement). De-localized from the production persona-named verdict field per spec §0.3 rule 6.

source_stack.description: Citations backing factual claims in the copy; required when a winner/comparator/recycle source was used.

warnings.description: Soft codes traveling with the item (model §2 Content Item invariant).

variant.description: One labeled copy variant with its per-variant scores and strength rationale.

text.description: The variant body. For threads, a multi-segment body per the platform packaging rules.

scores.description: Per-variant rubric scores (e.g. brand, stepps, algorithm).

rationale.description: Why this variant is strong (the 'why it's strong' rationale shown on the card).
